name: Pet продавачи — 5 продажби в 1 секунда (peak hour)
linked_bug: BUILD_PLAN Принцип 7 — пиков час петима в една и съща секунда
expected_result: Без deadlock грешки в SHOW ENGINE INNODB STATUS
smoke_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sales WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') HAVING n >= 3 LIMIT 1
